info.name: Get Information About Errors That Occurred During Runs of This Workflow Version

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: flowId
params.description: ID associated with the flow

params.name: flowVersionId
params.description: Version ID or version name associated with the flow version

params.name: duration
params.description: Duration of time range in milliseconds

params.name: end
params.description: End of time range in milliseconds since epoch

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of errors to return

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: deviceId
params.description: For edge workflows, the Device ID to return workflow errors for. When not included, will be errors for all device IDs.

items.docs: Get Information About Errors That Occurred During Runs of This Workflow Version

info.name: Updates Information About a Flow Version

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: flowId
params.description: ID associated with the flow

params.name: flowVersionId
params.description: Version ID or version name associated with the flow version

params.name: includeCustomNodes
params.description: If the result of the request should also include the details of any custom nodes referenced by the returned workflows

info.name: Returns the Flow Versions for a Flow

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: flowId
params.description: ID associated with the flow

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: page
params.description: Which page of results to return

params.name: perPage
params.description: How many items to return per page

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the results by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: includeCustomNodes
params.description: If the result of the request should also include the details of any custom nodes referenced by the returned workflows

params.name: query
params.description: Workflow filter JSON object which overrides the filterField and filter parameters.

items.docs: Returns the Flow Versions for a Flow

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: flowId
params.description: ID associated with the flow

info.name: Get Information About Errors That Occurred During Runs of This Workflow

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: flowId
params.description: ID associated with the flow

params.name: duration
params.description: Duration of time range in milliseconds

params.name: end
params.description: End of time range in milliseconds since epoch

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of errors to return

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: flowVersion
params.description: Flow version name or ID. When not included, will be errors for all versions. Pass develop for just the develop version.

params.name: deviceId
params.description: For edge or embedded workflows, the Device ID for which to return workflow errors. When not included, will be errors for all device IDs.
